title: SurveyorFactions
description: Compat between surveyor map framework maps mods (Antique Atlas4, hoofprint, etc) and Factions mod
body:
# SurveyorFactions

A Fabric mod that displays [Factions](https://github.com/ickerio/factions) claims on [Surveyor](https://github.com/sisby-folk/surveyor)-compatible maps.

## Features

- Shows faction territories on the map with faction colors
- Automatically updates when claims are added or removed
- Works with any Surveyor-compatible map frontend (Antique Atlas 4, Hoofprint, etc.)

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Fabric Loader 0.16.14+
- Fabric API
- [Surveyor](https://modrinth.com/mod/surveyor) 1.2.0+
- [Factions](https://modrinth.com/mod/factions) 2.5.1+
